rationale.fidelity: Preserves the vendor, capacity-feasible assortment, choice mechanism, uncertainty, and exact expected-revenue objective while rejecting welfare substitution.
rationale.managerial_framing: States the business decision and mechanism clearly, but gives less detail on the trigger, displacement trade-off, and operational counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is not requested or claimed; the response makes no unsupported novelty assertion.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly distinguishes modeled revenue effects from unsupported access or welfare claims and states what further measurement would be required.
rationale.overall: An excellent concise diagnosis and faithful rewrite; the only meaningful limitation is comparatively light managerial detail.
